summary: Full backend + frontend E2E testing for ATLAS VEX portfolio. All 8 backend pytest cases passed (root, contact create/list/validation, telemetry shape). Frontend renders correctly with no console errors and no R3F/x-line-number errors. Hero, neural-network canvas, sticky nav (7 items 00..06), identity portrait, 11 skill cards, 3 project cards, mission, 4 metric cards (live telemetry values populated 99.99%/157 rt/s/52 dist/2625 24h), contact form (submit succeeds via /api/contact, success status displayed, form cleared), all 4 social/email links, and footer all present and working.

issues: Tenet cards in Mission section do not appear to use a 'tenet-card' data-testid prefix; querying [data-testid^=tenet-card] returned 0 (visual rendering of 4 tenets is fine, this is testability-only)

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid="tenet-card-<n>" on Mission tenet cards for consistency with skill-card / metric-card / project-*-card pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 59: timestamp string conversion happens after model_dump but the response model returns the original `obj` (datetime object) — fine for JSON serialization via FastAPI, no bug. Mongo doc stores ISO string consistently with reverse parsing in list_contacts. OK.
list_contacts re-parses ISO timestamp using datetime.fromisoformat in a for-loop after Mongo query — works but you could store native datetime in Mongo to avoid the conversion. Minor.
ContactMessage uses extra='ignore' which prevents Mongo _id leakage even if accidentally passed; verified _id absent in GET /api/contact response.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI 0.110+ — consider lifespan handlers.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 contact messages prefixed with TEST_ in the contact_messages Mongo collection during testing. Safe to ignore or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_atlas_vex_api.py (pytest, JUnit at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml). All endpoints clean. Frontend uses data-testid heavily: site-nav (7 buttons), neural-network-canvas, contact-form, contact-status, contact-social-{github,linkedin,twitter}, contact-email-link, project-{legion-core,atlas-memory,omega-security}-card, skill-card-* (11 of), metric-card-* (4 of). NeuralNetwork uses vanilla three.js inside useEffect (not @react-three/fiber JSX) — no R3F errors detected. WebGL GPU stall warnings are benign performance hints from the headless GPU.
